name: Pasta with Oil and Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente, then keep warm.
2. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over low heat. Add garlic and cook slowly and gently until light gold. Remove from heat and stir in parsley and basil.
3. Add hot pasta to the skillet and toss to coat evenly.
4. Serve immediately with cheese.
